summary: CR8 iteration-2 backend test complete. All 64 tests pass (49 regression + 15 new). New coverage: uploads (5), analytics owner/creator (5), SSE stream + RBAC (2), AI top-matches owner-only + ranked list (2), email-side-effects fire-and-forget (1). Regression suite from iteration-1 still 49/49.

minor.issue: Field named `conversations` is described as unread count in docs but implementation returns TOTAL owner conversations (db.conversations.count_documents({owner_id})). Consider renaming to `total_conversations` or actually track unread.
`earned` returns current wallet balance rather than lifetime earnings — misleading naming; consider `wallet_balance` or compute lifetime from released escrow.

When LLM returns non-int score or malformed JSON for a creator, that creator is silently dropped. Fine for MVP but there is no partial-error surface; frontend cannot distinguish 'no matches' from 'LLM failed'.
Rewrites request scope in-place to inject a Bearer header from ?token=; works, but couples auth to internal FastAPI scope shape. Prefer a helper that decodes JWT directly for SSE path.
content_type comes from client; a malicious client can send image/png with any bytes. Server does not validate magic bytes. Acceptable for MVP.

action_items: Optional: rename analytics.conversations -> total_conversations and analytics.earned -> wallet_balance for clarity.
Optional: enforce magic-byte sniffing on /api/uploads instead of trusting client content-type.
Optional: split server.py (now 1232 lines) into routers — well above 700-line guideline.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py grew from 923 to 1232 lines — routers for uploads/analytics/sse/ai should be extracted.
SSE endpoint reconstructs `Request(scope=...)` to inject Bearer token from query-string. Works, but tightly coupled to FastAPI internal scope shape; safer to decode the JWT inline.
top-matches silently drops creators whose LLM score is not an int — no partial-error signalling to the client.
Uploads validate only client-supplied content_type (no magic-byte sniff) — trivial to spoof.
analytics/owner returns total conversations under a `conversations` key; docs imply 'unread'. Mismatch.
test_credentials: Used seeded credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — all valid.
seed_data_creation: New TEST-prefixed campaigns/applications/invitations/messages/uploads created; not cleaned. One PNG file left in /app/backend/uploads.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v -n 0` — 64 tests, ~30s. AI tests hit real Claude Sonnet 4.6 via Emergent LLM key. SSE test uses a threaded poster + iter_lines with a 12s hard cutoff; if flaky, extend cutoff. Top-matches test allows an empty list (pytest.skip) in case LLM has a bad run.
